app.name: Tagmi3ti
app.noscript: Please enable JavaScript to use Tagmi3ti.

auth.title: Your account
auth.successRegister: Account created. Check your email or sign in.
auth.loginRequiredDetail: Sign in to access this page — you will be redirected after login.

profile.title: My account
profile.description: Edit your personal details shown in the app.
profile.emailHint: Email is tied to your account and cannot be changed here.

validation.minNumber: Must be zero or a positive number
validation.checkFields: Fix the highlighted fields and try again

compat.ramMismatch: RAM type mismatch: board supports {{mbRam}}, RAM is {{ram}}
compat.coolerTdp: Cooler TDP ({{cooler}}W) is below CPU TDP ({{cpu}}W)
compat.coolerSocket: Cooler socket does not support CPU socket ({{socket}})
compat.bottleneckGpu: Warning: GPU is much stronger than CPU — possible bottleneck
compat.bottleneckCpu: Warning: CPU is much stronger than GPU — GPU may limit performance
compat.noStorePrices: Catalog parts have no prices — only store parts show prices
compat.noSpecs: No technical specs on file — search or ask the store.
compat.filterHint: Filter catalog by store or show all

store.title: Store dashboard
store.intro: Add parts and prices manually or via CSV — they appear in build lists with your store name.
store.phoneHint: Used for the WhatsApp button when users pick your parts.
store.logoHint: Square image (JPG, PNG, or WebP) — max 2 MB.
store.logoInvalidType: Unsupported image type. Use JPG, PNG, WebP, or GIF.
store.hoursNotesPlaceholder: Closed on public holidays, Ramadan hours…
store.mapsUrlHint: Paste the share link from Google Maps for your store.
store.deleteStoreConfirm: Delete store "{{name}}" and all its parts?
store.onboardHint: After creation you can add parts manually or import a file.
store.asideTrader1: Your parts appear in build lists for all users with your store name.
store.asideTrader2: You can import CSV/Excel or add parts manually later.
store.asideTrader3: Phone number powers the WhatsApp button on the build page.
store.catalogPrice: Prices you enter show as store-only prices on your parts.
store.catalogImport: Import from Excel for bulk — review preview before confirming.
store.catalogCompat: Compatibility is computed from specs (socket, TDP, GPU size...).
store.emptyParts: No parts yet — import a file or add your first part.
store.importHint: First row = column headers. Required: name, type. Save from Excel as CSV UTF-8.
store.importPreviewMore: Preview of first 10 rows — + {{count}} more parts...
store.asidePriceNote: Price column sums store prices for priced parts only.

home.title: Build your ideal PC in Egypt
home.subtitle: Check part compatibility and get smart suggestions — with store prices when available.
home.featuresTitle: What do you want to do?
home.featureCheckerDesc: Pick parts and verify socket, RAM, power, and case fit instantly.
home.featureBudgetDesc: Choose all seven parts and save your build — store prices only when listed.
home.featureAiDesc: Suggested build by use case and tier — free from available parts.
home.featureSavedDesc: View and manage builds you saved.
home.featureCompareDesc: Compare two builds by parts and compatibility — and price when stores list parts.
home.featureStoreDesc: Add your parts and prices — visible to everyone with your store name.

checker.title: Compatibility check
checker.description: Pick your parts — we check socket, memory, power, and dimensions right away.
checker.guide1: Choose from 7 categories; progress shows above the editor.
checker.guide2: Store prices appear only for retailer parts — filter catalog by store.
checker.guide3: Use Google search or store WhatsApp when a phone number is on the part.
checker.guideFooter: When done you can save the build from the editor — sign-in required.

budget.title: Build your PC
budget.description: Pick all seven parts and check compatibility — prices only from registered stores.
budget.tip1: Compatibility summary, bottleneck warning, and PSU needs show below the list.
budget.tip2: Compatibility % depends on filling all seven parts and how well they match.
budget.tip3: Total sums store prices only for parts listed by a retailer.

ai.title: AI suggestion
ai.description: Free automatic suggestion from available parts — no subscription or paid API.
ai.formHint: We pick compatible parts from the catalog based on your choices.
ai.how1: Assembles 7 categories: CPU, board, GPU, RAM, case, PSU, cooler.
ai.how2: Checks compatibility (socket, RAM, power, case size).
ai.how3: Fully free — no paid AI API.

saved.title: My saved builds
saved.description: View and manage builds — copy to edit or open a shopping list for the store.
saved.actionCopyDesc: Opens the checker editor with the same parts.
saved.actionShoppingDesc: Copy to clipboard or store WhatsApp when available.
saved.actionExpand: Expand any row to see parts and store prices.
saved.asidePrice: Price column sums store prices for priced parts only.
saved.shareHint: Anyone with the link can view this build (read-only).
saved.shareFailed: Could not create link — ensure migration-share-builds.sql has run

compare.title: Compare builds
compare.description: Pick two builds to compare parts and compatibility — and price when stores list parts.
compare.smart1: Table shows difference per category — match or different.
compare.smart2: Price compare uses store parts only; summary notes if none.
compare.smart3: Cheaper badges appear when store price data exists.
compare.pickHint: Compare two builds saved in your account.
compare.noBuildsHint: Save a build first from the compatibility page
compare.recPriceClose: Total store prices are very close between both builds.
compare.recNoPrices: No store prices in these builds — focus on parts and compatibility.
compare.recCompatA: «{{a}}» is compatible and «{{b}}» has issues — ready to use: A.
compare.recCompatB: «{{b}}» is compatible and «{{a}}» has issues — ready to use: B.
compare.recCompatNeither: Both builds need compatibility review before buying.
compare.recSameParts: Same parts in all seven categories — difference is compatibility or store prices.
compare.recDiffParts: {{diff}} categories differ, {{same}} match — see table for details.
compare.recGpu: GPU in «{{name}}» is stronger (higher TDP) — better for gaming and graphics.
compare.recCpu: CPU in «{{name}}» is stronger — better for programming and heavy tasks.

about.title: About Tagmi3ti
about.description: Free platform to build your PC in Egypt — compatibility and sharing.
about.nav1: Start with compatibility check, then save or share your build.
about.nav2: Retailers register a store and add parts with prices for users.
about.what1: Compatibility check for seven part categories
about.what2: Build your PC and free AI-style suggestions from available parts
about.what3: Save builds, compare them, and compatibility %
about.what4: Share a build with a read-only link
about.what5: Store dashboard for parts and prices (CSV / Excel)
about.whoBody: Anyone building a PC in Egypt — from beginners checking fit to enthusiasts comparing builds, and retailers listing local catalogs.
about.whoNote: Prices appear only for parts added by a registered retailer — confirm with the store before buying.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The link you opened is wrong or no longer available.
notFound.hint1: Check the URL or go back home.
notFound.hint2: Use the menu to open compatibility check or build your PC.

shared.readOnly1: This build was shared by link — you cannot edit it here.
shared.readOnly2: Prices shown are from stores registered in this build only.
shared.readOnlyFooter: To build your own, go home and start from compatibility check.
shared.notFound: Build not found or sharing was revoked

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.description: Last updated: May 2026 — we protect your data in a simple, clear way.
privacy.tocFooter: Full details in the card — review before commercial use.
privacy.s1i1: Account: email when you sign up via Supabase Auth.
privacy.s1i2: Saved builds: parts you chose and names you save (store prices if in the build).
privacy.s1i3: Store (optional): store name, phone, city, and catalog if you register as a retailer.
privacy.s1i4: Local preferences: e.g. dark/light theme and language — stored in your browser.
privacy.s2i1: Run the service: save builds, compare, share by link, and store dashboard.
privacy.s2i2: We do not sell your data to third parties for marketing.
privacy.s2i3: Smart suggestions are generated locally from available parts — no paid AI API with your data.
privacy.s3Body: When you create a share link, build content (name, parts, store prices if any) can be viewed by anyone with the link — no sign-in required. You can revoke sharing anytime from My builds.
privacy.s4Body: Data is stored on Supabase (database and auth). Their security policies apply plus our Row Level Security so users only see their builds and link-shared builds.
privacy.s5Body: We use browser local storage for theme and language. The PWA may cache static files for faster install — no ad tracking.
privacy.s6i1: Delete saved builds inside the app.
privacy.s6i3: Account deletion: contact us by email below to request server-side account deletion.

parts.emptyCatalog: No parts in the database yet. Run Supabase seed files or wait for stores to add parts.
parts.connectionFailed: Could not connect to the database. Check your connection or Supabase settings.

pwa.title: Install Tagmi3ti on your phone
pwa.subtitle: Faster access without an app store
